title: Bridge Essay: Body and peripersonal space representations in chronic stroke patients with uppe

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Body and peripersonal space representations in chronic stroke patients with upper limb motor deficits.**. Brain Commun.. PMID: 35950092. DOI: 10.1093/braincomms/fcac179. The continuous stream of multisensory information between the brain and the body during body-environment interactions is crucial to maintain the updated representation of the perceived dimensions of body parts (metric body representation) and the space around the body (the peripersonal space). Such flow of multisensory signals is often limited by upper limb sensorimotor deficits after stroke.
